name: Akaso V50 X Cube Action Camera
description: AKASO V50 You can also record unique time-lapse videos to turn longer events into short, shareable moments.2.1 Inch Touch Screen with HD Display With a touch screen and simple, efficient capture modes, it's easy to jump right in and get great shots. Just swipe and tap.

features.General Features: 4K/30fps, 2.7K/60fps. and 2.7K/30fps Video Recording | 2.1-inch touch screen | Electronic Image Stabilization (EIS) | BUILT-IN WIFI | 21m body waterproof | Built in 1050mAh battery | 5X Digital Zoom | Camera Size: 55*46*38mm | Weight: 100g( Built in battery)
features.What's in the box?: 1x V50 X Cube | 1x USB Cable | 1x Remote Control | 1x Remote Control Strap | 1x Clip 1 | 7x Mount | 1x Bicycle Stand | 2x Helmet Mount | 1x Spanner | 4x Bandage | 5x Tether | 1x Lens Cloth | 2x Double-Sided Adhesive Tape | 1x Quick Start Guide
